---
title: "Shiny App: ODI Grips Content Explorer"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
---

# Project 2: Interactive Shiny App

::: {.callout-important}
This Shiny app was created to provide an **interactive exploration tool** for ODI Grips Instagram content performance. Unlike the static dashboard, this app allows users to control the analysis by adjusting filters and exploring different performance dimensions in real time.
:::

## Project Overview

This Shiny app was built to provide an interactive way to explore ODI Grips Instagram performance data. Unlike the static dashboard from Project 1, this app allows users to dynamically filter and analyze the data based on their own interests.

The goal of the app is to help users understand how content strategy decisions affect performance across different metrics such as reach, engagement, and follower growth.

---

## Why Use a Shiny App?

::: {.callout-note}
A static dashboard is strong for summarizing a story. A Shiny app is stronger when the audience needs to **explore multiple versions of that story** on their own.
:::

A static dashboard is useful for showing overall trends, but it limits the user to a fixed view of the data. In contrast, a Shiny app allows users to:

- filter by date range  
- choose different performance metrics  
- compare media types  
- compare caption strategies  
- explore top-performing posts  

This makes the analysis more flexible and more valuable for decision-making.

---

## Data Used

The app uses ODI Grips Instagram post-level data, including:

- posting date  
- media type  
- caption type  
- reach and engagement metrics  
- follower growth  
- engagement rate  

These variables allow users to explore how different content strategies are associated with different outcomes.

::: {.callout-tip}
Because the app is interactive, one dataset can support many different user questions without needing separate reports for each one.
:::

---

## What the App Does

The app includes several interactive components:

- **KPI summary boxes** that update based on filters  
- **trend analysis** showing how performance changes over time  
- **media type comparison** to evaluate which formats perform best  
- **caption type comparison** to analyze messaging strategy  
- **top posts table** to identify the highest-performing content  

Users can adjust filters and immediately see how results change, making the app more useful than a static report.

---

## Main Benefits of This App

### 1. Flexible Exploration

Users are not locked into one view of the data. They can change filters and metrics based on what they want to investigate.

### 2. Better Decision Support

The app helps users compare content strategies more directly, which makes it more useful for marketing decisions.

### 3. Clearer Pattern Detection

Because the charts and table update instantly, relationships between timing, content format, and performance become easier to identify.

---

## Key Insight

::: {.callout-warning}
The main takeaway from this app is that Instagram performance is **not driven by one single strategy**. Performance varies across content format, caption approach, and timing.
:::

These relationships become much easier to understand when the user can interact with the data directly instead of relying only on a fixed summary dashboard.

---

## Why This Matters for ODI Grips

For ODI Grips, the value of this app is that it supports a more adaptive content strategy. Instead of assuming one content type always performs best, the app allows users to test how performance changes under different conditions and evaluate which combinations are strongest.

This makes the app useful not only as a class project, but also as a decision-support tool for content planning.

---

## Live Shiny App

You can access the full interactive app here:

[ODI Grips Shiny App](https://50kzbk-jeffrey-hsu.shinyapps.io/shiny_app/)

---

## Final Takeaway

Shiny adds value because it turns a static analysis into an interactive experience. For this project, it makes ODI Grips Instagram data more flexible, more informative, and more practical for real decision-making.
